files: /plugins/Skript/scripts/-- Files prefixed with a hyphen are disabled! --

props.command: # 監聽玩家的移動事件 on player move:     # 只有當玩家在 survival 世界時才運算     if world of player is "survival":                  # 精準偵測：玩家「即將踩進去」或「身體已經碰到」的方塊是終界傳送門方塊         if block at to-location is end_portal:                          # 防重複觸發的冷卻防線             if {teleport.cooldown::%player%} is not set:                 set {teleport.cooldown::%player%} to true                                  # 攔截原版事件，直接送去 Multiverse 的生存終界                 execute console command "mv tp %player% survival_the_end"                                  # 傳送特效與提示                 send "&a[傳送] &7你已成功穿越原版傳送門進入終界！" to player                 play sound "entity.enderman.teleport" with volume 1 and pitch 1 to player                                  # 3 秒後解除鎖定                 wait 3 seconds                 delete {teleport.cooldown::%player%}
